prompt: Cinematic realistic fashion portrait, Acropolis of Athens, widescreen 16:9. Stylish young adult woman, slightly to the right, framed from mid-thigh to top of head. Relaxed three-quarter pose—torso gently leaning left, face tilted slightly up toward camera right. Eyes nearly closed—tranquil, sun-kissed, contemplative atmosphere. Lips slightly parted, calm and confident expression. Character: Short, voluminous chin-length dark brown wavy hair, loose and airy, with fine strands naturally lifted by a breeze around the forehead and cheeks. Warm, soft glowing complexion. Low-key elegant makeup: natural skin texture, soft brow shape, subtle rose-red lip color, delicate eyeliner, soft warm-toned eye shadow. Jewelry: Small sculptural gold drop earrings, very fine gold necklace with a tiny pendant, and a second delicate chain hanging just above it. Clothing: Lightweight ivory linen button-down shirt—soft, slightly wrinkled texture, loose and breathable, sleeves casually rolled below the elbows. Top buttons open to create a relaxed V-neckline. Shirt hem tied in a soft knot at the right hip, fabric gathering and draping naturally. High-waisted wide-leg cream trousers—fine front pleats, structured waistband, belt loops, tonal belt with a subtle metal buckle. One hand casually in a pocket, the other arm hanging naturally at the side. The entire outfit maintains an elegant monochrome: warm white, ivory, oatmeal, and light beige. Scene: The Parthenon occupies most of the left and central background—weathered light-colored stone columns, entablature, and partially damaged pediments, slightly out of focus but clearly recognizable. Bleached marble blocks, uneven archaeological stone surfaces, broken columns, and scattered ruins extend into the background. One or two tiny, blurred visitors in the distance for scale only. Lighting: Bright natural Mediterranean daylight, late morning or early afternoon, sun from upper left/front left. Glowing highlights on cheekbones, bridge of nose, hair, shirt folds, and shoulders; soft warm shadows in the jawline and fabric folds. Slightly hazy pale blue-grey sky, dry sun-drenched atmosphere. Stone background in understated chalky white, light sand, weathered beige, and cool grey. Skin and gold jewelry provide restrained warmth. Camera and Color Grading: Full-frame 85mm portrait lens, f/2–f/2.8, shallow depth of field, smooth creamy bokeh, gentle background compression, sharp focus on face/hair/jewelry/upper clothing. Real skin pores, individual hair strands, natural linen fibers, real clothing folds, accurate hands, authentic ancient stone texture. Soft film tones: warm highlights, slightly cool neutral shadows, low to medium saturation, slight fine grain, restrained contrast, airy high-key quality. Elegant, quiet, sensual but not provocative, visual balance—sky and architecture extending on the left, figure anchored in the center-right position. Negative constraints: No strong artificial lighting, no heavy retouching, no plastic-looking skin, no over-saturated orange tones, no modern logos, no crowds, no distracting accessories, no text, no watermarks, no distorted columns, no distorted hands, no repetitive limbs, no excessive blur on the subject.

Relaxed three-quarter pose—torso gently leaning left, face tilted slightly up toward camera right. Eyes nearly closed—tranquil, sun-kissed, contemplative atmosphere. promptZh: 电影感写实时尚人像，雅典卫城，16:9 宽屏。时尚年轻女性，略微偏右，取景范围从大腿中部到头顶。放松的三分之四侧身姿势——躯干轻微向左倾斜，脸部微微向上朝向镜头右侧。双眼微闭——呈现宁静、被阳光亲吻、沉思的氛围。双唇微启，表情冷静自信。人物：短款蓬松的下巴长度深棕色波浪卷发，自然飘逸，几缕发丝随微风在额头和脸颊旁自然扬起。温暖柔和的肤色。低调优雅的妆容：自然的皮肤质感、柔和的眉形、淡玫瑰红色唇色、精致的眼线、柔和的暖色调眼影。饰品：小型雕塑感金色水滴耳环，一条非常精致的金色项链配有微型吊坠，上方叠戴一条细链。服装：轻盈的象牙白亚麻衬衫——质感柔软、略带褶皱，宽松透气，袖子随意卷至肘部下方。领口上方纽扣解开，形成休闲的 V 领。衬衫下摆在右侧腰部打了一个柔和的结，布料自然褶皱垂坠。高腰阔腿米色长裤——前部有细褶，结构感腰头，带有皮带环，同色系腰带配有低调的金属扣。一只手随意插在口袋里，另一只手臂自然垂在身侧。整体造型保持优雅的单色系：暖白、象牙白、燕麦色和浅米色。场景：帕特农神庙占据了背景左侧和中央的大部分区域——风化的浅色石柱、柱顶盘和部分受损的山墙，略微失焦但清晰可辨。漂白的白色大理石块、凹凸不平的考古石材表面、断裂的石柱和散落的废墟延伸至背景中。远处有一两个模糊的游客作为比例参照。光照：明亮的自然地中海日光，上午晚些时候或下午早些时候，阳光来自左上方/左前方。颧骨、鼻梁、头发、衬衫褶皱和肩膀上有明亮的高光；下颌线和布料褶皱处有柔和的暖色阴影。天空略带朦胧的淡蓝灰色，干燥且阳光充足的氛围。石质背景呈现低调的粉笔白、浅沙色、风化米色和冷灰色。皮肤和金色饰品提供了克制的暖意。相机与调色：全画幅 85mm 人像镜头，f/2–f/2.8，浅景深，平滑奶油般虚化，柔和的背景压缩，焦点清晰对准脸部、头发、饰品和上衣。真实的皮肤毛孔、清晰的发丝、天然亚麻纤维、真实的衣物褶皱、准确的手部细节、真实的古石质感。柔和的胶片色调：暖色高光，略带冷色的中性阴影，低至中等饱和度，轻微的颗粒感，克制的对比度，空气感的高调品质。优雅、安静、感性但不挑逗，视觉平衡——天空和建筑向左延伸，人物锚定在右中位置。负面约束：无强人工照明，无过度修图，无塑料感皮肤，无过度饱和的橙色调，无现代标志，无人群，无干扰饰品，无文字，无水印，无扭曲的石柱，无扭曲的手部，无重复肢体，主体无过度模糊。
